arts.ttl: AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini
arts.sum: Milan are stepping up their efforts to strengthen the squad after the recent acquisition of Kyle Walker, with a keen focus on bolstering the attacking options. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the club have set their sights on Bologna's winger Riccardo Orsolini. The post AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Balotelli’s Genoa Exit Looms: Empoli and Venezia Express Interest
arts.sum: Mario Balotelli's future at Genoa remains uncertain as the January transfer window enters its final days. Despite the striker's recent Instagram post asserting his commitment to the club, his lack of playing time under manager Patrick Vieira has fueled speculation about a potential move. The post Balotelli’s Genoa Exit Looms: Empoli and Venezia Express Interest appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Bologna: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season enters its crucial phase, Empoli and Bologna are set to face off in a match that could have significant implications for both teams' aspirations. The game, scheduled for Saturday, promises to be an intriguing battle between a side fighting for European qualification and another struggling to avoid relegation.
